task: Replacement for verify-runtime-parity-v15, which ran the checks successfully but failed the strict worker-output contract by wrapping JSON in prose/markdown. Do not edit project files. Use workspace-write only for normal temp files needed by tests. Re-run the same concrete release checks: focused unittest suite for tests.test_legion_core, tests.test_legion_shell_contract, and tests.test_retrospector_contract; shell syntax for scripts/legion.sh, scripts/legion-patrol.sh, scripts/hooks/pre-tool-use.sh, scripts/retrospector.sh; Python compile/AST checks for changed Python/test files; invalid-TMPDIR dry-run non-mutation checks for scripts/legion.sh mixed campaign --dry-run, duo --dry-run, and dou --dry-run; direct retrospector quick with PROJECT_DIR set to another repo while cwd is legion-0; daemon_evidence.jsonl schema/hash presence. Final output must be exactly one strict JSON object matching the worker schema: status, summary, files_touched, verification, findings, risks. Use lowercase verification results pass/fail/not-run and finding severities critical/major/minor/suggestion.
